hero.title: Keep your job search in order
hero.lede: Search active job ads from Platsbanken, create CVs and letters, and follow up on every application, from draft to response.

features.title: Everything you need to stay organised

search.body: Active job ads from Platsbanken, more sources planned. Sort by CV match, recency or deadline.

pipeline.body: Track every application from draft to response, through interviews, offers and rejections. Nothing falls through the cracks.

cv.body: Create and organise several CV variants. Generate cover letters that match your tone. You own every line.

reminders.body: Interviews and application deadlines are captured automatically from your applications, so you do not miss any deadlines.

waitlist.title: Join the waitlist
waitlist.lede: Jobbliggaren is in closed beta. We let users in as we have capacity. No dates are promised. Register your interest and we will get in touch when the next place opens up.
waitlist.privacyNote: We store your details only for the waitlist. You can ask us to delete them at any time by replying to the confirmation email.

form.checkFields: Check the fields and try again.
form.successBody: We have saved <mail>{email}</mail> on the waitlist. We will get in touch when we have capacity to let in more users. You do not need to do anything more right now.
form.nameMax: Name may be at most 100 characters.
form.emailMax: Email address may be at most 254 characters.
form.motivationLabel: Why do you want to use Jobbliggaren?
form.motivationMin: The motivation must be at least 10 characters.
form.motivationMax: The motivation may be at most 1000 characters.
form.motivationHint: Write briefly about how you intend to use the service. 10–1000 characters.
form.marketingConsent: I want to receive email with information about how Jobbliggaren is being developed (optional).
form.terms: By submitting you accept Jobbliggaren's <termsLink>terms of use</termsLink> and that we use <cookiesLink>necessary cookies</cookiesLink> to handle your registration.

action.closed: Registrations are currently closed. Try again later when we open the next pulse.
action.badRequest: Something was wrong with the details. Check them and try again.
action.tooMany: Too many registrations from this network address. Try again in a moment.
action.generic: An error occurred. Try again in a moment.
action.serverUnreachable: Could not reach the server. Try again.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.intro: Jobbliggaren uses only necessary cookies for the service to work during closed beta.
cookies.sessionBody: keep you signed in when you have an account.
cookies.noTracking: No cookies are used for analytics, tracking or marketing.
cookies.fullPolicyNote: A full cookie policy will be published before the service opens to the public.

terms.title: Terms of use
terms.intro: Jobbliggaren is in closed beta. Full terms of use will be published before the service opens to the public.
terms.duringBeta: During the beta period the following applies:
terms.asIs: The service is provided as is. Features may change or be added.
terms.dataRetention: We store your details only for as long as is needed to handle your registration or your account.
terms.dataDeletion: You can ask us to delete your details at any time by replying to the confirmation email or contacting us.

meta.waitlistDescription: Jobbliggaren is in closed beta. Register your interest and we will get in touch when we have capacity to let in more.
meta.cookiesDescription: Information about cookies on Jobbliggaren. Only necessary cookies are used during closed beta.
meta.termsDescription: Jobbliggaren's terms of use. Closed beta: full text will be published before the first open registration.
